title: Prologue — The Others
summary: Three rangers of the Night's Watch venture beyond the Wall and encounter the terrifying Others. Ser Waymar Royce is killed, and Will witnesses something that will change the realm forever.

title: Winterfell — The Direwolf Pups
summary: The Stark party returns from an execution. On the way back to Winterfell, they discover a dead direwolf with five pups — one for each Stark child. Jon Snow finds a sixth, an albino runt.

title: Winterfell — The King Arrives
summary: King Robert Baratheon arrives at Winterfell with his court. He visits the crypts to pay respects to Lyanna Stark, and asks Ned to become Hand of the King.

title: Castle Black — Jon Meets the Watch
summary: Jon Snow arrives at Castle Black and finds the reality of the Night's Watch far grimmer than the stories. He meets Tyrion Lannister at the top of the Wall.

title: King's Landing — Ned Takes His Post
summary: Ned Stark arrives in King's Landing and begins his duties as Hand of the King. He quickly realizes the city is a nest of secrets and betrayal.

title: Vaes Dothrak — Daenerys and the Dothraki
summary: Daenerys embraces her role as Khaleesi among the Dothraki. She begins to find her strength and sense of identity far from the world she once knew.

title: The Eyrie — Tyrion's Trial
summary: Tyrion Lannister demands a trial by combat at the Eyrie. Bronn fights on his behalf and wins, securing Tyrion's freedom in a tense and unexpected victory.

title: King's Landing — Ned's Execution
summary: Eddard Stark confesses to treason in exchange for mercy, but Joffrey orders his execution regardless. Arya watches from the crowd as her father is beheaded.
